---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a product, firmware, portability, or tooling improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Goal

What outcome should the feature deliver?

## Product Context

- [ ] Standalone firmware capability
- [ ] Host-assisted workflow
- [ ] Board portability
- [ ] Sensor support
- [ ] Tunability or configuration
- [ ] Operator UX
- [ ] CI or release process

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the expected user-facing and system-facing behavior.

## Hardware Scope

- Affects current SKR2 target only
- Must stay board-agnostic
- Requires new board capability layer
- Requires new sensor or driver support

## Validation Strategy

How should this be tested?

## Risks or Constraints

List any safety, timing, portability, or compatibility concerns.
